response.justification: Candidate has well over a decade of full-stack engineering experience, with recent and directly relevant work in TypeScript/Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) — matching the core stack and the AI-agent requirement. Demonstrated breadth across backend, frontend, mobile, and embedded, plus a track record of TDD, CI/CD, and architecture contributions. Gaps exist around Nest.js, Kotlin, and PostgreSQL specifically, but the foundational skills transfer cleanly and the seniority bar is exceeded.
strengths: Recent hands-on experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and AI-agent/MCP tooling
15+ years across full stack with strong testing/TDD discipline and architecture exposure
Proven polyglot ability (TS, Java, C/C++, D, Swift, PHP) supporting the multi-language requirement
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the primary stack
Kotlin and PostgreSQL not mentioned; relational DB experience is limited to MySQL/SQL
Significant share of recent backend work was in MongoDB/AWS ecosystems rather than the exact target stack

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and Kotlin in stack
